examples: He was sinking into the Slough of Despond.
That he didn't finished the work on time despond me.
At that time the country was in the slough of despond.
That period of exuberance followed a long stretch in the 1970s and 1980s when investors were in a slough of despond.
As the overblown optimism wears off and the hopes of JK Rowling-like status evaporate, so the slough of despond will take a hold.
